The '''Obana Belt''', also known as '''Rycar's Run''', was a field of [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] near [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was the site of small amounts of [[Mining/Legends|mining]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] activity.
